name: report_date_present
expression: report_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(report_date)) > 0
description: report_date is required for Daily Drilling Report extraction.

name: well_name_present
expression: well_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(well_name)) > 0
description: well_name is required for Daily Drilling Report extraction.

name: operator_name_present
expression: operator_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(operator_name)) > 0
description: operator_name is required for Daily Drilling Report extraction.

name: rig_name_present
expression: rig_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(rig_name)) > 0
description: rig_name is required for Daily Drilling Report extraction.

name: measured_depth_present
expression: measured_depth IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(measured_depth)) > 0
description: measured_depth is required for Daily Drilling Report extraction.

name: operations_summary_present
expression: operations_summary IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(operations_summary)) > 0
description: operations_summary is required for Daily Drilling Report extraction.

name: measured_depth_non_negative
description: measured_depth should be non-negative when present.

name: true_vertical_depth_non_negative
description: true_vertical_depth should be non-negative when present.

name: daily_footage_non_negative
description: daily_footage should be non-negative when present.

name: mud_weight_non_negative
description: mud_weight should be non-negative when present.
